title: ayenia praeclara
intro: Ayenia praeclara is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Malpighiaceae and commonly known as the Mexican stonebreaker. Its leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ayenia praeclara include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Ayenia praeclara typically involve drying and preparing the leaves and roots for consumption in tea, capsule, or tincture form.
